greeting.speaker: Deputy Hayes
greeting.text: Cid. Don't walk away. I need thirty seconds.

choices.text: You're starting to worry me Deputy.

what_is_it.speaker: Deputy Hayes
what_is_it.text: That federal agent filed paperwork this afternoon. Voluntary cooperation form. Your name's on it.

worry.speaker: Deputy Hayes
worry.text: Good. You should be. Your name showed up on a federal form this afternoon.

talk_fast.speaker: Deputy Hayes
talk_fast.text: Your name's on a federal voluntary cooperation form. Filed this afternoon.

core.speaker: Deputy Hayes
core.text: Did you sign anything for that man?

choices.text: He had me do some things. Called them tests.

nothing.speaker: Deputy Hayes
nothing.text: Then how did your name get there.

tests.speaker: Deputy Hayes
tests.text: Those weren't tests Cid. I don't know what they were but they weren't tests.

form.speaker: Deputy Hayes
form.text: I can't read it. It's redacted down to the watermark. But your name's clear as day.

decision.speaker: Deputy Hayes
decision.text: I can stall him tonight. Make up a reason to keep him occupied. But that's all I can do.

choices.text: Don't put yourself at risk for me.
What do you think I should do?

accept_help.speaker: Deputy Hayes
accept_help.text: You've got a window. Use it for whatever you need to use it for.

decline_help.speaker: Deputy Hayes
decline_help.text: That's not your call to make. Go.

ask_advice.speaker: Deputy Hayes
ask_advice.text: I think you should trust whoever in this town has been honest with you. And move.

farewell.speaker: Deputy Hayes
farewell.text: Go. And Cid. Whatever happens tonight. I filed a report.

greeting_return.speaker: Deputy Hayes
greeting_return.text: Window's still open. Don't waste it.
